case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO A MUNICIPAL VS REID CARETH B IND DBA 208 SCOTT ST. APTS.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $766.25 FILED BY CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO A MUNICIPAL CORPORATION, INVESTIGATION DIVISION ROOM 220 AS TO DEFENDANT REID CARETH B IND DBA 208 SCOTT ST. APTS. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-07-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 00
